examples.question: Mua 1 AirPods giao Ha Noi, tong bao nhieu VND?
examples.ideal_answer: San pham AirPods hien tai da het hang trong kho. Khong the thuc hien don hang.

examples.question: Mua 2 ao thun dung ma SALE10 ship Da Nang, tong cong bao nhieu?
examples.ideal_answer: San pham ao thun co san voi gia 100000 VND/chiec. Ma SALE10 giam 10%. Phi van chuyen den Da Nang la 20000 VND. Tong cong: 200000 VND subtotal, sau giam gia la 180000 VND, cong shipping la 200000 VND. Tong cong: 200000 VND
